�新 New post (Published: June 25, 2026)

AI summary (For accurate information, please check the original article)

A special summer holiday parent-child tour of Hanno City's Clean Center. Explore behind the scenes of the facility and learn about areas not usually open to the public. After the tour, there will be a simple craft workshop using cooling agents where you can make your own original creations.

【Date and time】 July 23, 2026 (Thursday) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m.

【Location】 Hanno City Clean Center (768-1 Shimohata, Hanno City) – Parking available

【Who can attend】 Elementary school students and guardians living in Hanno City (younger siblings who are preschool age may also participate)

【Capacity】 About 15 groups (first come, first served)

【Application period】 July 9, 2026 (Thursday) through July 22, 2026 (Wednesday) at noon

【How to apply】 Apply by phone or email (clean@city.hanno.lg.jp). When applying, please provide the names of your child and guardian, your child's school name and grade, and your contact information.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/cleancenter/13174.html
summary: ℹ️ Summer holiday parent-child facility tour
